_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: We observed that reduced TAZ/YAP expression in Lats1/2-deficient SCs markedly extended the survival of Lats1/2-def-TazLo/LoYap1Lo/Lo mice
details: Reduced TAZ/YAP expression in Lats1/2-deficient SCs markedly extended the survival of Lats1/2-def-TazLo/LoYap1Lo/Lo mice
